questions.question: You have a Fabric workspace. You have semi-structured data. You need to read the data by using T-SQL, KQL, and Apache Spark. The data will only be written by using Spark. What should you use to store the data?

You have a Fabric workspace that contains a warehouse named Warehouse1. You have an on-premises Microsoft SQL Server database named Database1 accessed by using an on-premises data gateway. You need to copy data from Database1 to Warehouse1. Which item should you use?

You have a Fabric workspace that contains a warehouse named Warehouse1 and an on-premises SQL Server database named Database1 accessed via a data gateway. You need to copy data from Database1 to Warehouse1. Which item should you use?
Evaluate the following statements regarding Delta Lake operations.

statements.statement: The target table will always be overwritten.
The merge operation will always run.
The loading pattern supports both full and incremental loading requirements.

questions.question: You have a Fabric workspace with Lakehouse1 and Lakehouse2. Lakehouse2 contains a Type 2 SCD dimension named Dim_Customer. You must combine Orderlines with Dim_Customer to create Fact_Orders.

You have a Fabric workspace that contains a lakehouse named Lakehouse1. External data files of 500 GB are added daily. You must ingest the files without transformation and trigger ingestion when new files arrive while providing highest throughput.

You have a Fabric workspace that contains an eventhouse and a KQL database named Database1. An update policy sends data from Table1 to Table2. Recently changes were made to Table1. Which two records will load from Table1 to Table2?
You are debugging a statement that sometimes fails to return expected rows. The PurchaseDate column must appear in the expected format while retaining data types.
You are developing a data pipeline that copies data from Snowflake to a Fabric warehouse. What should you configure?
You need to populate MAR1 data in the bronze layer. Which two activities should be included in the pipeline?
